0=No setup or physical help from staff
 1=Setup help only
 2=One person physical assist
 3=Two+ persons physical assist
 8=ADL activity did not occur or family and/or non-facility staff provided care 100% of the time for that activity over the entire 7-day period discontinued 09/30/2023
